| | ICYMI: President Trump just hand-picked a Republican opponent for my race. | | | [Donate](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa26f/18d6a294/4b863bcc/26d6726d/918756265/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jme190717nd?refcode=jme190717nd_m&recurring=true")
---
Here are some things you should know:
* My new opponent hasn't even officially announced his bid for the Senate. **He told Trump first.**
* It's not the first time his priorities have been out of whack: He's been quietly **planning his campaign for _months_ while he's supposed to have been serving our country abroad.**
* He's been **a key player in Trump 's trade policies**, some of which **hurt Tennessee more than any other state.**
* Not only does he have Trump's "complete and total" endorsement, others **like Senator Marsha Blackburn, are already making calls on his behalf.**
* **He was Trump 's Tennessee Victory Chairman**, raising millions to buy himself a cushy diplomatic posting.

It's no surprise that the president loves candidates who will rubber stamp his agenda. Tennesseans need someone who will stand up for what's right for them and not just what's right for Trump. **We already know Trump 's policies don't work for Tennessee.**
I want to fight for you. First I need your help in order to compete with all my opponents special interest allies.

name: Cory Booker
subject: If you don't see the very real connection between Trump's words and his policies, you're not paying attention.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| Friend, "You don't belong here." "You're not one of us." "Go back to where you came from." These are racist comments Black and Brown people have heard our whole lives, and now we're hearing it directly from the highest office in the land. On Monday, Trump announced that he's ending asylum protections for nearly every migrant who arrives at the U.S.-Mexico border. If you don't see the very real connection between Trump's words and his policies, you're not paying attention. This president is doing his best to keep immigrants -- specifically those that don't look like him -- out of our country. By effectively ending asylum at our southern border, Trump is reversing decades of U.S. policy governing how we treat refugees and putting countless lives in danger. **It 's a policy that's not only immoral -- it's illegal. And if we truly want to be a country that touts liberty and justice for all, we must stand against it.** A lot of people are rightfully talking about Trump's tweets, but not enough people are talking about this policy. **[It needs your voice -- add your name to stand against Trump's inhumane anti-immigrant policies.](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc085c/5fca0d19/ae6fd2d/29180f23/2913791024/VEsH/ "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/trumps-racist-words-and-anti-immigrant-policies?source=em_20190717")** Thanks, and let's all remember: No matter what Donald Trump says, no human being is illegal. Cory
[](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc085c/5fca0d19/ae6fd2d/29180f23/2913791024/VEsE/ "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/trumps-racist-words-and-anti-immigrant-policies?source=em_20190717")

subject: Principles Video Spot
body:
Watch our new video

| | | | | | Today, our Campaign released a 30-second digital ad titled, "Principles". The video highlights his wife's view of Robert's principles and faith.
Our latest video is part of a series of statewide digital ads highlighting our political outsider, business and conservative background in Mississippi's Gubernatorial Primary this August. We hope you will watch and share with your family and friends.
Our campaign is committed to reaching voters across Mississippi, whether in person or online, and we are utilizing every resource at our disposal to make sure Mississippians know that, as governor, I promise to move the needle on issues like education, infrastructure, and to make our state the best place to raise a family or hire an employee.

body:
_**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/8358316/80721224/-391868641?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MDk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOGUwMjdlZC02ZGE5LWU5MTEtYmNkMC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EK5stR_4sNLNNMRhshxrPopf85eo7UfiWMHCerPH-Ng=&refcode=em_fr_2019.07.18_b1_es_all&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000)**_
---
Team,

I wanted to write this morning to share something that I am focused on. We all know that our election systems are vulnerable, and we urgently need to do something about it. **That's why I helped to form a group of bipartisan lawmakers called "Task Force Sentry," focused on preventing foreign interference in U.S. elections, so that what happened in 2016 with Russian interference does not happen again in 2020.** In case you missed it, [**our work was recently featured in the _Detroit News._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/8358317/80721225/1622882164?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MDk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOGUwMjdlZC02ZGE5LWU5MTEtYmNkMC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EK5stR_4sNLNNMRhshxrPopf85eo7UfiWMHCerPH-Ng=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/8358318/80721226/1622882164?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MDk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOGUwMjdlZC02ZGE5LWU5MTEtYmNkMC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EK5stR_4sNLNNMRhshxrPopf85eo7UfiWMHCerPH-Ng=) Task Force Sentry is comprised of first-term lawmakers with national security, legal, and tech backgrounds. We meet once a week to discuss common sense fixes to make sure our vulnerable elections systems are not attacked again. **We are a bipartisan group -- because the integrity of our elections systems is at stake.** My participation in Task Force Sentry has been some of the most productive time I’ve spent as a member of Congress thus far. **The dedication and commitment of my colleagues gives me hope as we work to ensure that the 2020 election is not vulnerable to further attacks.**

Thank you for believing in this mission.

Elissa

PS: [**As you know, Michigan will be a toss-up next year. Can you donate today to help us prepare for 2020?** ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/8358319/80721227/-391868641?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MDk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOGUwMjdlZC02ZGE5LWU5MTEtYmNkMC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EK5stR_4sNLNNMRhshxrPopf85eo7UfiWMHCerPH-Ng=&refcode=em_fr_2019.07.18_b1_es_all&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) | **[DONATE →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/8358320/80721228/-391868641?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MDk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOGUwMjdlZC02ZGE5LWU5MTEtYmNkMC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EK5stR_4sNLNNMRhshxrPopf85eo7UfiWMHCerPH-Ng=&refcode=em_fr_2019.07.18_b1_es_all&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000)**

name: Gov. Mike Huckabee
subject: More disturbing information - but there is a solution
body:
| | Peter, Late last month the California State Assembly passed a shocking resolution that tries to force pastors to condemn all counseling for those who struggle with gender confusion or same-sex attraction, and it even goes so far as pressuring churches to affirm homosexuality. Needless to say, this is a massive attack on religious freedom. And Christians not only in California, but across the nation, should take notice. There are 90-million Christ-followers in America. Do they see the direct assault on the Word of God? Do you? **[This is why My Faith Votes has an extensive church initiative underway to reach pastors and lay members in the church to take action - to be informed and vote](https://www3.myfaithvotes.org/p190718apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190718apl01nd&n=1)**. We believe the key to cultural change is awakening churches and Christian voters across the nation by providing modern, state of the art voting resources directly to an active church member. I know you believe in our work. You’ve stood with us time and time again and we thank you for your partnership. You share a belief in God. And you share a belief that we must commit ourselves to get every like-minded, like-hearted Christian to vote. **Why? Because elections matter. We can’t let culture dictate the direction of our nation.** History tells us that as many as 25 million registered Christians will not vote in 2020. They will sit silently at home while the media and the entrenched political class try to destroy marriage, increase abortions, romanticize socialism, demonize capitalism, and eliminate our “one nation, under God.” **[What you and I do now – TODAY – will determine how many Christians vote in 2020](https://www3.myfaithvotes.org/p190718apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190718apl01nd&n=2)**. Our mandate is to provide every voting tool necessary and remove every obstacle for Christians to turn their faith into action. **We are very close to launching our Voter Mobilization Toolkit for churches. This will provide you, and tens of thousands of other Christians across the nation, with everything you need to activate your church to get ready to vote in local and national elections - but we need your help.** Not only do these resources cost money to produce, but the strategy to distribute this to churches across the nation will cost roughly $75,000. With your help today, we can meet that need and empower over 30,000 churches. **[Will you prayerfully consider making your best gift to My Faith Votes today for our church voter initiative? Your donation will make a difference](https://www3.myfaithvotes.org/p190718apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190718apl01nd&n=3)**. When you donate, I’ve got a gift for you! You will be the first to receive the Voter Mobilization Toolkit - before it’s even released - so that you can get a jump start on equipping your church members to register and vote. The best line of defense against the attacks on marriage, family, and life are active Christians in the Church. Together we can change the course and impact our culture. [](https://www3.myfaithvotes.org/p190718apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190718apl01nd&n=4) **United. We Stand.**

Gov. Mike Huckabee
Honorary National Chairman
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190718apl01nd&n=5)
---

name: Team Hood
subject: Ridiculous
body:
|
---
Throughout his career, and in this race for governor, Jim has focused on the issues that matter to Mississippi families -- expanding access to healthcare, improving our education system, and combating domestic violence.
Friend,

Throughout his career, and in this race for governor, Jim has focused on the issues that matter to Mississippi families -- expanding access to healthcare, improving our education system, and combating domestic violence. Meanwhile, our opponents have been making a campaign issue out of restricting opportunities for women.

In the past week, not one but _**two**_ Republican candidates for Mississippi governor publicly announced that they follow the "Billy Graham rule," which means that they refuse to be alone with a woman they are not married to, even in a professional context. **[We need a governor who will fight for _all Mississippians_ , and we need your support to win this race.](https://act.myngp.com/el/w7Frn2watWG1At0_8oGLyLXG_wfBa8EDUBvrp2COCu0=/rUiim7HOe3hZOw_eqQWuAAYQQ-lO9jQZn3qapg65pBk=?refcode=20190718nd&amount=10)**
Such a policy is unacceptable from our public servants, and we wanted to make sure you saw Jim's statement on the issue:
> "First, in 2019, to even be having this conversation is ridiculous. That said, strong women, beginning with my mom, have played an important role in my life, in my Attorney General's Office and in my campaign for Governor. If I couldn't meet with women alone to discuss issues important to them and to Mississippi, I wouldn't be able to do my job. As Governor, women will play an important role in my administration. I will move to pass an equal pay law for women; continue to fight domestic violence against women; and provide economic opportunities in business and industry for women. And I will do all these things while meeting with women -- alone if necessary -- to hear their voices and champion their causes."
The contrast here couldn't be more clear -- as governor, Jim will be a champion for women in the workforce and will build an executive office that represents all Mississippians.

**[Help us elect a candidate who will support Mississippi women and families, and ensure that they have a seat at the table. Friend, Throughout his career, and in this race for governor, Jim has focused on the issues that matter to Mississippi families -- expanding access to healthcare, improving our education system, and combating domestic violence. Meanwhile, our opponents have been making a campaign issue out of restricting opportunities for women. In the past week, not one but two Republican candidates for Mississippi governor publicly announced that they follow the "Billy Graham rule," which means that they refuse to be alone with a woman they are not married to, even in a professional context. Such a policy is unacceptable from our public servants, and we wanted to make sure you saw Jim's statement on the issue: "First, in 2019, to even be having this conversation is ridiculous. That said, strong women, beginning with my mom, have played an important role in my life, in my Attorney General's Office and in my campaign for Governor. If I couldn't meet with women alone to discuss issues important to them and to Mississippi, I wouldn't be able to do my job. As Governor, women will play an important role in my administration. I will move to pass an equal pay law for women; continue to fight domestic violence against women; and provide economic opportunities in business and industry for women. And I will do all these things while meeting with women -- alone if necessary -- to hear their voices and champion their causes." The contrast here couldn't be more clear -- as governor, Jim will be a champion for women in the workforce and will build an executive office that represents all Mississippians. \--Team Hood | |

name: Tim Walz
subject: I reject the NRA’s false narrative
disclaimer_text: paid for by Tim Walz for Governor
body:
My friend, Everyone deserves to live their lives without the fear of being shot and killed. It's sad such an obvious statement is worth repeating, but the fact is hundreds of Minnesotans are killed by gun violence every year. On a national scale, 100 Americans per day are killed with guns. I say this as a lifelong sportsman. I say this as a 24-year veteran of the Army National Guard. I say this as a former high school teacher. I say this as a father. Enough is enough. **ADD YOUR NAME: Demand Action on Gun Violence**
[**Help us collect 10,000 signatures in support of common-sense gun safety measures by next week to keep the pressure on lawmakers this summer.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/pcEVj8c5joCAaebRtxRGy9HTBs_4UDumZzwOMx84di8=/UsAnH7ztJ868AJbZQcFLB9N_7nzZDQ7jTmnC_s1BDRA=) **[Add Your Name](https://act.myngp.com/el/pcEVj8c5joCAaebRtxRGy9HTBs_4UDumZzwOMx84di8=/UsAnH7ztJ868AJbZQcFLB9N_7nzZDQ7jTmnC_s1BDRA=)** My friend, Everyone deserves to live their lives without the fear of being shot and killed. It's sad such an obvious statement is worth repeating, but the fact is hundreds of Minnesotans are killed by gun violence every year. On a national scale, 100 Americans _per day_ are killed with guns. I say this as a lifelong sportsman. I say this as a 24-year veteran of the Army National Guard. I say this as a former high school teacher. I say this as a father. Enough is enough. I reject the false narrative pushed by the NRA that we can't protect our children, our loved ones, and ourselves without infringing on second amendment rights. We absolutely can, and a majority of Minnesotans agree, including most gun owners. That's why I fought alongside DFL lawmakers to push for common-sense "red flag" and background check gun safety laws last session. Unfortunately, both measures were blocked by Republicans who couldn't muster the courage to do the right thing. **We can 't afford another year of inaction and obstruction as the gun violence epidemic rages on, claiming lives and devastating families across our state and country.** With legislators back in their home districts for the summer, I'm asking you to help me make an undeniable statement about the overwhelming support in our state for common-sense gun safety measures. There's only one way we're raising money for this campaign.

I'm not holding any fundraisers where you can only get in by writing a big check -- because a person's wealth shouldn't determine how much time they can spend with me, or with any presidential candidate.

I'm not asking a billionaire to bankroll a Super PAC for me -- because the Democratic primary can't just be one more plaything for the rich and powerful.

I'm not taking a dime from Washington lobbyists, corporate PACs, or, shoot, PACs of any kind -- because our campaign is about people, not powerful special interests.

**Instead, we're running a fully grassroots-funded campaign with grassroots donors -- because that's the only way we'll build a movement strong enough to make big, structural change in our economy, our government, and our democracy.

And right now, I'll just be blunt: We need to catch up a bit on our July fundraising.** Tomorrow night, I'll find out which night I'll be in our next Democratic presidential debate. By then, I'd love to be able to know that we're back on track to hit this month's goal.

name: Tina Smith
subject: It's time for Congress to pass legislation to lower the cost of prescription drugs. Are you with me?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
I'm counting on you to raise your voice in this fight.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-july2019?refcode=rtw_1907_rxdrugsja_em-b&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=") Friend,

As I travel across Minnesota, people in living rooms, auditoriums, and community centers all over the state ask why vital prescription medications have to cost someone their life savings.

The answer is: They don't.

But far too many people struggle every day to cover costs for the medicine they need. That's why one of my most important fights in Washington is to lower prescription drug prices. We must value people first, not big pharma companies' profits.

**[I'm calling on Congress to pass legislation to lower the cost of prescription drugs -- and I'm asking you to join me. Will you add your name now?](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4e4f3/c1f7015/659f33bc/1146bace/3229961016/VEsE/ "https://www.signherenow.org/petition/rx-drugs/smith/e/")** **[ADD YOUR NAME](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4e4f3/c1f7015/659f33bc/1146bace/3229961016/VEsF/ "https://www.signherenow.org/petition/rx-drugs/smith/e/")** I believe health care is a human right. No one should be forced to skip doses or ration drugs because they can't afford the medications they need.

In Washington, I've worked hard to lower the skyrocketing prices of critical drugs by introducing legislation, including the Affordable Medications Act and the Emergency Access to Insulin Act.

Every day Congress delays passing this and other important legislation is another day people across the country struggle to afford their medicine.

**[Don't let Big Pharma win again: Add your name now to call on Congress to pass legislation to lower the cost of prescription drugs.](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4e4f3/c1f7015/659f33bc/1146bace/3229961016/VEsC/ "https://www.signherenow.org/petition/rx-drugs/smith/e/")**

We can't let pharmaceutical companies get even richer while leaving behind people who can't afford life-saving medicine. I'm counting on you to raise your voice in this fight.

Thank you,
Tina | **U.S. Senator Tina Smith is running for re-election in 2020 in a race _NBC News_ has already labeled a "race to watch" with Donald Trump targeting Minnesota for victory. Make sure she has the resources to fight back.** [CONTRIBUTE](https://action.tinaforminnesota. subject: are you in?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for America
body:
| | | Team,

Michael sent you an important email yesterday outlining his Medicare-X public option plan to get our country to universal health care. We hope you'll take a minute to read it below.

But here's the cliff notes version: Medicare-X allows every American to make the right health coverage choice for themselves and their family. It's the best and fastest way to universal coverage.

[That's why we want to make sure you've signed our Medicare X petition. You can add your name here:](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbad4b/134673f2/fcd5634/69968768/779759815/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIn0=/ "https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/s/MedicareX?source=EM_PET_B1_071819_AC_ND&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=")

| | [ADD YOUR NAME >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbad4b/134673f2/fcd5634/69968768/779759815/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIn0=/ "https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/s/MedicareX?source=EM_PET_B1_071819_AC_ND&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=")
---

Thanks for taking action.

Team Bennet
* * *
[](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbad4b/134673f2/fcd5634/69968768/779759815/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIn0=/ "https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/s/MedicareX?source=EM_PET_B1_071819_AC_ND&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=")
Team, when I decided to run for president, I knew achieving universal healthcare coverage would be one of my top priorities.

I hope you'll give me a few moments to explain my plan for how to get there.

[It's called Medicare-X, and it's the fastest and best way to achieve universal health care for all.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbad4b/134673f2/fcd5634/69968768/779759815/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIn0=/ "https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/s/MedicareX?source=EM_PET_B1_071819_AC_ND&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=")

Medicare-X creates a public option -- an insurance plan available on the exchange that gives people the choice of keeping their current insurance or purchasing a more affordable public plan. Medicare-X, for the first time in history, requires the federal government to negotiate lower prescription drug prices. And it will force private insurers to compete and lower premiums across the board, especially in rural areas.

When it comes to expanding health coverage for millions of Americans, I don't think banning private insurance is the answer.

180 million Americans don't want to give up the insurance they receive through their employer.

20 million seniors don't want their Medicare Advantage stripped away.

Union members don't want their negotiated plans eliminated.

Medicare for All would do all of that.

My Medicare-X plan gives Americans the choice to decide what's right for their families.

[Team, I want to hear from you. Do you support my plan to achieve universal coverage with Medicare-X?](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbad4b/134673f2/fcd5634/69968768/779759815/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIn0=/ "https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/s/MedicareX?source=EM_PET_B1_071819_AC_ND&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=")

| [ADD YOUR NAME >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbad4b/134673f2/fcd5634/69968768/779759815/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIn0=/ "https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/s/MedicareX?source=EM_PET_B1_071819_AC_ND&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=")
---

Medicare for All may sound good at first, but when voters understand that it bans all private insurance--including employer and union plans--and dramatically raises their taxes, public support plummets.

And that could mean Democrats losing key states in the 2020 election.

We need a healthcare agenda with overwhelming support that voters can rally behind so we can beat Donald Trump in 2020; that plan is Medicare-X.

Team, Medicare-X is the fastest way to achieve universal health coverage - in a way that works best for all Americans.

[Please sign on and let me know if you're committed to making progress on health care now >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbad4b/134673f2/fcd5634/69968768/779759815/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIn0=/ "https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/s/MedicareX?source=EM_PET_B1_071819_AC_ND&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=")

| [ADD YOUR NAME >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbad4b/134673f2/fcd5634/69968768/779759815/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIn0=/ "https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/s/MedicareX?source=EM_PET_B1_071819_AC_ND&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=")
---

Thanks for joining the fight,

Michael

subject: Drug Overdose Deaths Drop in U.S. for First Time Since 1990
body:
"Three decades of ever-escalating deaths from drug overdoses in the United States may have come to an end..." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6db47046d2&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Drug Overdose Deaths Drop in U.S. for First Time Since 1990**

“Three decades of ever-escalating deaths from drug overdoses in the United States may have come to an end, according to preliminary government data made public Wednesday. Total drug overdose deaths in America declined by around 5 percent last year, the first drop since 1990,” _The New York Times_ reports.

“The decline was due almost entirely to a dip in deaths from prescription opioid painkillers . . . President Trump made the opioid crisis one of the health care priorities in his 2016 campaign message.”

The President declared the opioid epidemic a national public health emergency in 2017.

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f9ab388bd5&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| Rather than addressing the causes of our border crisis, “obstructionists in Washington have spent the better part of a decade chasing down news cameras and pointing fingers, rather than proposing workable legislation,” Sen. Marsha Blackburn (R-TN) writes in [Fox News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=aba191fff6&e=3ee4985eea). “Bottom line: We owe it to our Border Patrol officials, the American people, and earnest asylum seekers to put the talking points aside and give them the resources they are asking for.”
---
|
---
| “The Department of Justice announced the arrest of nearly two dozen MS-13 gang members this week who are connected to horrific murders carried out in California. Victims were hacked to death with machetes and in some instances, had their hearts ripped out,” Katie Pavlich reports for [_Townhall_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4d54893a55&e=3ee4985eea). All told, 19 of the 22 individuals charged were in the United States illegally. “California, a sanctuary state that refuses to work with Immigration and Customs enforcement, protected them. According to the indictment, they engaged in crime sprees spanning multiple states.”
---
|
---
| “With 224,000 jobs created last month, June’s jobs report brought good news for American workers – more jobs and higher wages. Simply put, Congress, working with the Trump Administration, is bringing real results to the American people,” Sen. Lamar Alexander (R-TN) writes in [_Overton County News_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=12655db14c&e=3ee4985eea). “Americans are enjoying one of the lowest unemployment rates in 50 years.”
---
|
---
| “Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) is viewed more favorably than any member of the so-called ‘squad’ of freshman Democratic congresswomen, according to a new poll,” Amber Athey writes in [_The Daily Caller_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7df5d8af4c&e=3ee4985eea). “’The Squad’ gained more attention last week when House Speaker Nancy Pelosi tried to diminish their influence in the Democratic Party. Its members responded by implying that Pelosi is racist and intentionally attacking women of color.”
---
|

body:
#
Peter,
Yesterday, President Trump tweeted that Democrats in Congress "are getting nothing done."
[](http://action.dickdurbin.com/page/m/45ff4cf2/42ab3cf4/6265bf2f/135d75b1/566750042/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjM0MjIzIiwiSlNWR1NWSlRWRTVCVFVVbEpRPT0iOiJQZXRlciJ9/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://durbin.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/the-grim-reaper-of-the-senate?source=em190718&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter")
Well, Mr. President, nothing could be further from the truth. Democrats in the House are working overtime to pass urgent and meaningful legislation on everything from protecting people with pre-existing conditions, to fighting the threat of climate change, to reforming our gun laws, to defending our democracy.
But nearly every piece of progressive legislation passed by House Democrats is dying in self-described "Grim Reaper" Majority Leader Mitch McConnell's legislative graveyard in the Senate.
**[We must put a stop to this era of Republican obstruction. Tell Mitch McConnell and the Senate GOP it's time to get to work for the American people. Add your name now.](http://action.dickdurbin.com/page/m/45ff4cf2/42ab3cf4/6265bf2f/135d75b1/566750042/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjM0MjIzIiwiSlNWR1NWSlRWRTVCVFVVbEpRPT0iOiJQZXRlciJ9/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://durbin.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/the-grim-reaper-of-the-senate?source=em190718&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter")**
Democrats in Congress are fighting to lower prescription drug costs, reduce the costs of health care, and strengthen the middle class.
But Mitch McConnell and Senate Republicans are standing in the way, blocking bill after bill that would help improve the lives of families all across the nation. Enough is enough.
**[Peter, we've got to fight back on behalf of the American people. Join me in calling on Senate Republicans to stop blocking our progress now.](http://action.dickdurbin.com/page/m/45ff4cf2/42ab3cf4/6265bf2f/135d75b1/566750042/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjM0MjIzIiwiSlNWR1NWSlRWRTVCVFVVbEpRPT0iOiJQZXRlciJ9/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://durbin.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/the-grim-reaper-of-the-senate?source=em190718&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter")**
My best,
Dick Durbin
**[Sign the Petition](http://action.dickdurbin.com/page/m/45ff4cf2/42ab3cf4/6265bf2f/135d75b1/566750042/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjM0MjIzIiwiSlNWR1NWSlRWRTVCVFVVbEpRPT0iOiJQZXRlciJ9/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://durbin.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/the-grim-reaper-of-the-senate?source=em190718&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter")**

From: John Hickenlooper
Subject: One week from today
Date: Wed July 17 at 6:23 PM

After Mueller's press conference in May, where he refused to clear Trump of potential crimes, I made my position clear:

**Congress has a responsibility to get the facts. We also need to focus on the serious and ongoing threat to our election security and national security from Russia 's interference in our elections, which threatens our democracy. Mueller's testimony underscores the urgency of the moment. We have to beat Trump at the ballot box.

**If you agree that the American people deserve a President who will ensure the security of our democracy, chip in $5 right now to help us expand our campaign.** subject: what does it mean to be a “sustainer”

body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/1yA6upLKtjFj3_n11zRBJTQpFBAYQ7oMPRj0hu6c83E=/C5904MLP1aBl9mfz6MvtizmEiDeReOw55H7KBqLDziE=?refcode=BLU-footer)
---
Hi Peter

As Abigail is holding town halls across every county in the 7th district and working hard on Capitol Hill, our campaign team is planning for 2020 each and every day. We're outlining our outreach strategy, detailing our communications plan, and finalizing our campaign budget for next year.

We have an ambitious fundraising goal for this race because we have an ambitious and fulsome communications and outreach plan. National Republican Super PACs have already made it clear they want to replace Abigail, and we won't let that happen.

As we plan diligently, [_**would you help us by becoming a sustaining donor to our campaign?**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/1yA6upLKtjFj3_n11zRBJTQpFBAYQ7oMPRj0hu6c83E=/EI9pcxXCu1zshW31s4sXaiVAwJvdAB8OXYR6m9OwtCU=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20190718-1-EM&recurring=TRUE&amount=5&amounts=5,10,20,50,100)

Forecasting our budget can be tricky when our campaign relies on grassroots donations, so I'm asking if you would consider making a recurring donation each month? It could be $10 per month or $100 per month, it depends on you. But here is how it helps the campaign win:
* It gives us a reliable and predictable amount each month.
* It sends a signal to our opponents about the financial strength of our campaign.
* It gives us greater flexibility in planning and the ability to plan further ahead.

name: Wilmot Collins
subject: Did you catch me on Morning Joe this morning?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by A whole lot of folks for Wilmot Collins, PO Box 458, Helena, MT 59624
body:
#
Team,
Those of you who've met me in person know that I love a good cup of coffee. This morning, I had the pleasure of dropping in on Morning Joe to talk about our campaign.
I shared why I'm running, and I also talked about Senator Steve Daines' unacceptable support for President Trump's hateful comments encouraging four congresswomen of color to "go back" where they came from.
**Watch the clip, then share it with your friends and family to spread the word about our campaign and ask them to get involved.**
**[](https://act.wilmotcollins.com/page/m/56164754/1e3760f0/69e466ef/5f7ea7b8/1757400924/VEsH/?g=ENsuPVNw52hc6i6rfY8XtkA "https://www.facebook.com/WilmotCollinsforSenate/posts/651343845339556")**
[SHARE ON FACEBOOK](https://act.wilmotcollins.com/page/m/56164754/1e3760f0/69e466ef/5f7ea7b8/1757400924/VEsE/?g=ENsuPVNw52hc6i6rfY8XtkA "https://www.facebook.com/WilmotCollinsforSenate/posts/651343845339556")
[SHARE ON TWITTER](https://act.wilmotcollins.com/page/m/56164754/1e3760f0/69e466ef/5f7ea7b9/1757400924/VEsF/?g=ENsuPVNw52hc6i6rfY8XtkA "https://twitter.com/intent/tweet?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.msnbc.com%2Fmorning-joe%2Fwatch%2Fdem-challenger-in-montana-calls-on-gop-senator-to-apologize-64077381686&text=Watch%20%40CollinsWilmot%20on%20%40Morning_Joe%20talk%20about%20his%20campaign%20for%20U.S.%20Senate%20and%20why%20Senator%20Daines%20should%20apologize%20for%20backing%20President%20Trump%E2%80%99s%20unacceptable%20rhetoric.%20")
As I said this morning, right now, Montanans only have one senator in Washington who is looking out for our interests. I'm counting on your support to replace Senator Daines and spreading the word to your friends and family is an important first step.
Thank you for sharing,
Wilmot

Last week, Debbie and her colleagues on the House Oversight Committee held a hearing to look into the Trump Administration's plan to overturn the entire Affordable Care Act.

Let us tell you, what they discovered was alarming.

Republicans are strategically working their way through the court system in the hopes of getting rid of the ACA for good. name: Mark Warner
subject: my plans
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
People have been asking me lately: What's next? How do we build on Democratic victories in Virginia? And, most importantly: How do we beat Donald Trump in 2020?
---
| | Derek _,_

People have been asking me lately: What's next? How do we build on Democratic victories in Virginia? And, most importantly: _How do we beat Donald Trump in 2020?_

This has been on my mind every time I've traveled through Virginia to make sure we elect Democrats at the local, state, and federal level.

**Here's my plan: I'm going to work with everything I've got to help Virginia Democrats take back the Senate and House of Delegates in 2019 and then make sure we keep Virginia blue in 2020. That means traveling the state to campaign for Democrats, defending hard-won Congressional seats, and building our grassroots Democratic organization across the Commonwealth.**

I want you to do this with me -- commit to being a part of this effort over the next two years. I don't have a signup sheet or a form for you to fill out, but I want you to commit to doing _whatever is in your power to make sure we win in 2019 and send Donald Trump a very clear message in 2020_. That could mean knocking doors, talking to neighbors, working the polls, or whatever it is you're able to contribute. If you don't live in Virginia, then go out and make a difference in your community.

Unfortunately, our political system also requires tough, expensive campaigns. That goes double for battleground states like Virginia. name: =?utf-8?Q?Juli=C3=A1n_Castro?=
subject: RE: Eric Garner, Tamir Rice, Sandra Bland
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Julian for the Future
body:
I will never forget the series of events that took place. | | |
---
| | [](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fce7e/3eb3e2fc/597707f9/744a47a5/4094134085/VEsH/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://www.julianforthefuture.com")
---
| | I know there's a lot happening. But right now, I need you to take a second to remember Eric Garner. [_**Then -- if you're as outraged as I am -- sign your name next to mine. Condemn the stunning failure we just witnessed to bring justice in his murder. >>**_](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fce7e/3eb3e2fc/597707f9/744a47a4/4094134085/VEsE/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/criminal-justice-survey?source=20190718_em_pet_b1_castro_all") I will never forget the series of events that took place. Eric Garner was put in an illegal choke hold for 7 seconds. His last words were "I can't breathe," repeated 11 times over. A law enforcement officer murdered him in broad daylight. And now that officer will not be held accountable for it. **Hear me loud and clear: This is a miscarriage of justice.** [_**I will not stay silent while black and brown folks are murdered by our country 's broken policing system. This is a national crisis, and it must be treated like one. In this critical moment, I'm counting on you to have my back on this. >>**_](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fce7e/3eb3e2fc/597707f9/744a47a4/4094134085/VEsF/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/criminal-justice-survey?source=20190718_em_pet_b1_castro_all") To say I'm disappointed is a severe understatement. I'm outraged. I refuse to accept a world in which police can arrest a white man like Dylann Roof who murdered nine people worshipping -- without hurting him -- but Eric Garner Tamir Rice Sandra Bland Laquan McDonald Philando Castile Alton Sterling Trayvon Martin Freddie Gray Michael Brown Pamela Turner Antonio Arce Jason Pero Stephon Clark And countless other people of color had their lives cut short by excessive police brutality. **It 's unacceptable. It's unjustifiable. And I'm going to use my voice to demand justice. ** [_**Today, I 'm asking you to raise your voice with me. Will you add your name next to mine before midnight? If justice won't be served, it's up to us to rise up and demand it. >> **_](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fce7e/3eb3e2fc/597707f9/744a47a4/4094134085/VEsC/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/criminal-justice-survey?source=20190718_em_pet_b1_castro_all") Thank you, Julian Castro P.S. When I learned Eric Garner's killer would go free, I was horrified. [_**I hope you 'll take a second to watch my response, and share it with your communities.**_](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fce7e/3eb3e2fc/597707f9/744a47a3/4094134085/VEsD/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://twitter.com/JulianCastro/status/1151282042052775938") We must never allow this kind of injustice to be swept under the rug.
---
| | | | | | | [](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fce7e/3eb3e2fc/597707f9/744a47a2/4094134085/VEsA/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://twitter.com/JulianCastro")
---

---
| | [](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fce7e/3eb3e2fc/597707f9/744a47a0/4094134085/VEsO/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://www.instagram.com/juliancastrotx/")

No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

**[DONATE](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fce7e/3eb3e2fc/597707f9/744a47af/4094134085/VEsP/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**
Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fce7e/3eb3e2fc/597707f9/744a47ae/4094134085/VEsHBQ/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails"). If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fce7e/3eb3e2fc/597707f9/744a47ad/4094134085/VEsHBA/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/unsubscribe"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

body:
With Taylor's announcement and Trump believing Virginia is "in play" for 2020, we're going to have to invest in our grassroots campaign now all the way to Election Day to keep Virginia blue.
|
---
| | Derek,

I'm writing today to ask for your help.

**Now that former Congressman Scott Taylor is officially running against me, this race has entered a new stage. The truth is, if we don 't have everyone [pitching in](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d1eb/53d9897e/51ad3ffe/1c8e7007/3120420222/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE0NSJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-taylorrecord?refcode=20190718nd__145__&refcode2=ask1&amount=5"), we're not going to be able to keep Virginia blue.**

Jenny tells me that while 1,520 supporters pitched in to our Fight Back Fund, we missed our 2,000-donation goal -- and in a campaign this high-profile, with President Trump saying he wants to win in Virginia, that's not something we can afford.

**So I 'm reaching out to personally ask for your help. Will you make your first donation today to help us get back to where we need to be?** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ name: Senator Jeff Merkley
subject: Big Pharma doesn't like my plan to take them on:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
| [](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2dd84/6cd27893/4f0c4e00/1580ad64/2001892574/VEsH/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "http://www.jeffmerkley.com")
---

| | It's an awful feeling: looking down at bills on a kitchen table, trying to figure out how to afford everything. And knowing that, sometimes, you just can't -- no matter how hard you work or save. Food. Rent. Health care. Prescription drugs. **That last one, the high cost of prescription drugs, is what I want to talk to you about right now. Because it's a _massive_ __ problem that's not being dealt with and is putting people's lives at risk.** **[I'm taking on the pharmaceutical industry. Will you donate right now and stand with me?](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2dd84/6cd27893/4f0c4e00/1580ad65/2001892574/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjl2Ym1WOWZRPT0iOiI1IiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjkwZDI5OWZRPT0iOiIxNSIsImUzdGhZbUZ0ZEY5MGFISmxaWDE5IjoiMjUiLCJlM3RoWW1GdGRGOW1iM1Z5ZlgwPSI6IjUwIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjltYVhabGZYMD0iOiIxMDAifQ==/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?refcode=2019-07-18-drugprices&recurring=1&amount=3&amounts=5,15,25,50,100")** [Chip in $3 Now](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2dd84/6cd27893/4f0c4e00/1580ad65/2001892574/VEsF/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjl2Ym1WOWZRPT0iOiI1IiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjkwZDI5OWZRPT0iOiIxNSIsImUzdGhZbUZ0ZEY5MGFISmxaWDE5IjoiMjUiLCJlM3RoWW1GdGRGOW1iM1Z5ZlgwPSI6IjUwIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjltYVhabGZYMD0iOiIxMDAifQ==/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?refcode=2019-07-18-drugprices&recurring=1&amount=3&amounts=5,15,25,50,100") No one should ever have to worry about cutting pills, skipping doses, being late on rent, or going hungry because they can't afford the cost of their medication. The problem is that Big Pharma pulls strings in Washington to make sure that they can keep digging deeper and deeper into our pockets. For example, recently they got the Trump administration to rig the new NAFTA to lock in even higher prices. Here's the bottom line: _We need to stand up to Big Pharma and put American consumers before drug company profits._ **My plan? Simple: Require drug companies to give Americans the same pricing they do in Canada, Japan, Australia, and Europe.** Medicine is medicine. The only reason drugs cost more in America is corporate greed -- and politicians who enable it. Let's change that. If drug companies want to sell in America, they need to stop gouging Americans. Period. My plan is going to ruffle some feathers at Big Pharma and make a few very wealthy people very upset. They're going to work overtime to beat us in the next election. But I know that I've got you on my side. [**Stand with me as we take on Big Pharma. Chip in $3. Let's fight back today.**](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2dd84/6cd27893/4f0c4e00/1580ad65/2001892574/VEsC/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjl2Ym1WOWZRPT0iOiI1IiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjkwZDI5OWZRPT0iOiIxNSIsImUzdGhZbUZ0ZEY5MGFISmxaWDE5IjoiMjUiLCJlM3RoWW1GdGRGOW1iM1Z5ZlgwPSI6IjUwIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjltYVhabGZYMD0iOiIxMDAifQ==/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?refcode=2019-07-18-drugprices&recurring=1&amount=3&amounts=5,15,25,50,100") _Jeff_ Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | [$5](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2dd84/6cd27893/4f0c4e00/1580ad62/2001892574/VEsD/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZiMjVsZlgwPSI6IjUifQ==/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=2019-07-18-drugprices&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$15](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2dd84/6cd27893/4f0c4e00/1580ad63/2001892574/VEsA/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZkSGR2ZlgwPSI6IjE1In0=/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=2019-07-18-drugprices&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$25](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2dd84/6cd27893/4f0c4e00/1580ad60/2001892574/VEsB/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZkR2h5WldWOWZRPT0iOiIyNSJ9/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=2019-07-18-drugprices&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$50](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2dd84/6cd27893/4f0c4e00/1580ad61/2001892574/VEsO/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZabTkxY24xOSI6IjUwIn0=/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=2019-07-18-drugprices&refcode2=express-buttons")

body:
President Donald J. Trump welcomed Prime Minister of the Netherlands Mark Rutte to the White House today, where the President accepted... | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=53619ec8f4&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • July 18, 2019
---
| | |
# **On behalf of our country, President Trump receives a piece of American history**

**President Donald J. Trump** welcomed Prime Minister of the Netherlands Mark Rutte to the White House today, where the President accepted an incredible gift.

**“Today,** on behalf of the American people, I will receive an American flag that flew aboard a ship carrying the first waves of United States service members to land in Normandy,” President Trump said. “Seventy-five years after that momentous day,” this great piece of American history is “back home where it belongs.”

**Watch:** [“It is my honor to welcome this great American flag back home.”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=14bfce7da7&e=3ee4985eea)

**This 48-Star banner** is an important symbol of perhaps the most storied military victory for the free world. On June 6, 1944, the flag President Trump received today flew aboard Landing Craft Control 60 as it approached Normandy. The ship was commanded by a young Navy lieutenant, two days shy of his 27th birthday, named Howard Vander Beek.

**“Amid treacherous** German minefields, raging winds, and rough seas, Lieutenant Vander Beek and his crew led an astonishing 19 waves of American troops and equipment to those very, very dangerous beaches,” the President explained. “Through it all, this flag soared proudly above the waters of the English Channel, announcing the arrival of our American warriors.”

**After the D-Day mission** was complete, Lt. Vander Beek carried the flag with him through the end of the war. It stayed in his possession until he passed away in 2014.

**Today,** this same flag—which still bears scars from German gunfire and stains from American blood—is being returned home, where it will be on display in the Smithsonian National Museum of American History in Washington, D.C.

**“It will always** be a reminder of the supreme sacrifice of our warriors, and the beautiful friendship between the Dutch and the American people,” President Trump said.

**That close partnership** continues today, as the United States and the Netherlands work to meet security challenges head-on. Whether it’s efforts to defeat ISIS or support NATO's forward presence in the Baltics and Poland, both nations’ forces stand together.

**🎬****Watch:** [The Netherlands present America with a historic D-Day flag.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3cad64ec70&e=3ee4985eea)

**More** : [In France, President Trump honored D-Day’s 75th anniversary](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=82c3363154&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## **Team USA Special Olympic athletes visit the White House**

**Athletes who represented** **America** at the 2019 Special Olympics World Games visited the Oval Office today, where they were greeted by President Trump, First Lady Melania Trump, Vice President Mike Pence, and Second Lady Karen Pence.

**“What you have done** is incredible,” the President told them. “All those medals.”

**The Vice President** and Second Lady have been heavily involved with supporting the Special Olympics under President Trump. The President asked the Second Lady herself to lead the U.S. delegation at the World Games.

**“This is probably** the highest honor I will ever have as Second Lady,” she said.

**“You make us so proud** —not just for your athletic prowess, but for the way you represent our country and the way you reach out to other nations and other athletes.”

🎬**Watch:** [President Trump welcomes Team USA from the Special Olympics](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6f01acdd4c&e=3ee4985eea)
